chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 810 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.3613/2025 (Stay/App) 3. For hearing of main case 10.06.2025 Mr. Abdul Sattar Shar Advocate along with petitioners. Mr. Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, D.P.G. Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Mr. Khan Muhammad Sangi, Advocate has filed power on behalf of respondent No.5, whereas, statement has been filed on behalf of respondents No.2, which are taken on record. Pursuant to order dated 29.05.2025 respondent No.4 (SIP Ghulam Akber Mirani, Investigating Officer of Crime No.75 of 2025 registered at Police Station Daharki, District Ghotki under Sections 365-B, 452 PPC and 3 of Prevention of Trafficking in Persons Act, 2018) is present, files a copy of statement of alleged abductee Mst. Sobia (Petitioner No.1) recorded under Section 161 CrPC, and states that as per her statement, she being sui juris has contracted marriage with Irfan Ali (Petitioner No.2) with her own accord and freewill and is living happily with him in a pleasant atmosphere. She has further stated that her father (Respondent No.5) has lodged abovementioned false FIR regarding her abduction, which is nothing but bundles of lies, as she was never abducted or enticed by anyone. Investigating Officer further states that he will file a copy of such statement along with his report before the concerned Magistrate for disposal of the above FIR in accordance with law. Page 2 of 2 Counsel for petitioners on being satisfied with the statement of Investigating Officer does not press this petition.

Investigating Officer further states that he will file a copy of such statement along with his report before the concerned Magistrate for disposal of the above FIR in accordance with law. Page 2 of 2 Counsel for petitioners on being satisfied with the statement of Investigating Officer does not press this petition. Accordingly, the same stands disposed of with directions to official respondents to provide protection to the couple in accordance with law, as and when they needed. J U D G E J U D G E Irfan/PS
